questions.stem: Look at the photo: A woman is sitting at a desk in an office.
questions.explanation: 照片中女性坐在办公桌前，A选项准确描述了这一场景。B说她站着，C说她在走路，D说她在打电话，均与照片不符。

options.text: She is typing on a keyboard.
She is standing near the window.
She is walking down the hallway.
She is talking on the phone.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A man is alone in a library.
questions.explanation: 照片中男性在图书馆里阅读书籍，B选项准确描述。A说在写字，C说在用电脑，D说在整理书架，均不正确。

options.text: He is writing in a notebook.
He is reading a book at a table.
He is using a computer.
He is arranging books on a shelf.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A person is outdoors on a sunny day in a park.
questions.explanation: 照片中一个人在公园里散步，C选项最准确。A说在跑步，B说在骑自行车，D说在坐长椅上，与照片不符。

options.text: The person is jogging on a track.
The person is riding a bicycle.
The person is walking along a path.
The person is sitting on a bench.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A woman is in a store near the checkout counter.
questions.explanation: 照片中女性在商店收银台旁，D选项描述她在购买商品最准确。A说在试衣服，B说在看菜单，C说在打扫，不符合场景。

options.text: She is trying on clothes.
She is looking at a menu.
She is cleaning the floor.
She is paying for her purchases.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A man is at an airport terminal gate area.
questions.explanation: 照片中男性在机场等候区等待登机，A选项准确描述。B说在办理值机，C说在取行李，D说在过安检，不是照片内容。

options.text: He is waiting at the boarding gate.
He is checking in at the counter.
He is collecting his luggage from the carousel.
He is going through the security checkpoint.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: Several people are gathered around a table in a conference room.
questions.explanation: 照片中多人围坐在会议室桌旁开会，B选项准确描述。A说在吃午饭，C说在搬家具，D说房间是空的，均不符合。

options.text: The employees are having lunch together.
A meeting is being held in the conference room.
Workers are moving furniture out of the room.
The conference room is empty.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: Two people are standing near a printer in an office.
questions.explanation: 照片中两人站在打印机旁查看文件，C选项最准确。A说在修打印机，B说在用复印机，D说在搬打印机，均不符。

options.text: They are repairing the printer.
One person is using the copy machine alone.
They are reviewing a document from the printer.
They are carrying the printer to another room.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A restaurant scene with a waiter serving food to customers at a table.
questions.explanation: 照片中服务员正在给餐桌旁的客人上菜，A选项准确描述。B说客人在看菜单，C说餐厅关门了，D说在打扫桌子，不符合。

options.text: A waiter is placing dishes on the table.
The customers are looking at menus.
The restaurant is closed for the evening.
A busboy is clearing the table.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: An office setting with several employees working at their desks with computers.
questions.explanation: 照片中多名员工在办公桌前使用电脑工作，D选项准确描述了开放式办公室场景。A说只有一个人，B说在休息，C说在开会，不符合。

options.text: Only one person is in the office.
The employees are taking a break in the lounge.
A group meeting is being conducted.
Several workers are using computers at their workstations.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A hospital corridor with a nurse pushing a wheelchair.
questions.explanation: 照片中护士在医院走廊推轮椅，B选项准确描述。A说医生在检查病人，C说走廊是空的，D说在递药，不符合。

options.text: A doctor is examining a patient in a room.
A nurse is pushing a wheelchair through the hallway.
The corridor is completely empty.
A pharmacist is handing out medication.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A parking lot with cars and a person loading groceries into a vehicle.
questions.explanation: 照片中一个人在停车场将杂货装入车辆，C选项准确描述。A说停车场是空的，B说在修车，D说在洗车，均不正确。

options.text: The parking lot is empty.
A mechanic is fixing a car in the lot.
A shopper is loading bags into the trunk of a car.
Someone is washing a vehicle in the parking area.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: Two people shaking hands in a lobby area with a reception desk behind them.
questions.explanation: 照片中两人在大厅握手，背后有前台，A选项准确描述了商务会面场景。B说在争论，C说在签合同，D说在等电梯，不正确。

options.text: Two business people are greeting each other in the lobby.
Two colleagues are having an argument.
They are signing a contract at the reception desk.
People are waiting for the elevator.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A busy intersection with pedestrians crossing the street and vehicles stopped at a traffic light.
questions.explanation: 照片中行人在过马路，车辆在红灯前停着，D选项准确描述。A说街道空无一人，B说车辆在移动，C说只有自行车，不正确。

options.text: The street is deserted with no people in sight.
Vehicles are moving quickly through the intersection.
Only bicycles are crossing the road.
Pedestrians are crossing while cars wait at the signal.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A man in a hard hat is pointing at blueprints on a table at a construction site.
questions.explanation: 照片中戴安全帽的男性在工地上指着桌上的蓝图，B选项准确描述。A说在搬砖，C说在操作起重机，D说在休息，不符合。

options.text: A worker is carrying bricks across the site.
A foreman is reviewing blueprints at the construction site.
A crane operator is lifting materials.
Construction workers are taking a lunch break.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A factory floor with assembly line workers wearing safety goggles and gloves.
questions.explanation: 照片中工厂里的装配线工人戴着护目镜和手套在工作，A选项准确描述。B说工厂是空的，C说工人在开会，D说在搬箱子，不正确。

options.text: Workers are assembling products on a production line.
The factory floor is empty and the machines are off.
Employees are attending a safety meeting.
Workers are loading boxes onto a truck.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A construction site with scaffolding on the side of a building and workers at various levels.
questions.explanation: 照片中建筑工地上脚手架搭在建筑物侧面，工人在不同高度作业。C选项准确描述了脚手架(scaffolding)上的场景。注意scaffolding是TOEIC常考词汇。

options.text: Workers are painting the interior of the building.
The building has been completed and is ready for occupancy.
Scaffolding has been erected along the exterior of the building.
A crane is demolishing the old structure.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A dock area with cargo containers stacked near a large vessel, and a forklift moving goods.
questions.explanation: 照片中码头区域有集装箱堆放在大船旁，叉车在运货。B选项准确描述了码头(dock)场景。注意dock和forklift是重要词汇。

options.text: Passengers are boarding a cruise ship.
Cargo is being transported by forklift near the docked vessel.
Fishing boats are tied up at a small marina.
The harbor is empty with no ships in sight.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A warehouse interior with tall shelving units filled with boxes and a worker operating a pallet jack.
questions.explanation: 照片中仓库内有高大的货架装满箱子，一名工人在操作托盘搬运车。D选项准确描述了仓库(warehouse)和托盘搬运车(pallet jack)的场景。

options.text: Customers are browsing products in a retail store.
The shelves are empty and awaiting new stock.
Workers are unloading a delivery truck outside.
A warehouse employee is moving inventory with a pallet jack.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: An airport tarmac with ground crew loading luggage onto a conveyor belt leading to an aircraft.
questions.explanation: 照片中机场停机坪上地勤人员通过传送带将行李装入飞机。A选项准确描述了停机坪(tarmac)和传送带(conveyor belt)的场景。

options.text: Ground crew members are loading baggage onto the aircraft via a conveyor belt.
Passengers are walking across the tarmac to board the plane.
A fuel truck is refueling the airplane.
Mechanics are inspecting the landing gear of the aircraft.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A laboratory with technicians in white coats examining specimens under microscopes.
questions.explanation: 照片中实验室里穿白大褂的技术人员在用显微镜检查样本。C选项准确描述了实验室场景。注意specimen和microscope是重要词汇。

options.text: Doctors are performing surgery in an operating room.
Students are attending a chemistry lecture.
Lab technicians are analyzing specimens through microscopes.
Researchers are conducting a field study outdoors.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A loading dock area where workers are stacking crates onto a flatbed truck.
questions.explanation: 照片中装卸区(loading dock)工人将板条箱(crates)堆放到平板卡车(flatbed truck)上。B选项准确描述。注意loading dock和crates是TOEIC易混淆词汇。

options.text: A delivery van is parked in front of a retail store.
Crates are being loaded onto a flatbed truck at the loading dock.
Workers are unpacking merchandise inside a stockroom.
Forklifts are transporting pallets across a parking lot.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A greenhouse filled with potted plants on raised benches, with an overhead irrigation system visible.
questions.explanation: 照片中温室(greenhouse)里有盆栽植物放在高架台上，可以看到头顶的灌溉系统。D选项准确描述了温室和灌溉系统(irrigation system)的场景。

options.text: A gardener is mowing the lawn in a backyard.
Flowers are displayed for sale at an outdoor market.
Trees are being planted along a residential street.
Potted plants are arranged on benches inside a greenhouse with irrigation equipment overhead.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A hotel lobby with a bellhop pushing a luggage cart past the front desk.
questions.explanation: 照片中酒店大堂里行李员(bellhop)推着行李车(luggage cart)经过前台。A选项准确描述。注意bellhop和luggage cart是TOEIC常考词汇。

options.text: A bellhop is wheeling a luggage cart through the hotel lobby.
Guests are checking out at the reception counter.
A concierge is hailing a taxi outside the entrance.
Housekeeping staff are vacuuming the lobby carpet.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A roadside scene with a utility crew working on overhead power lines from a cherry picker.
questions.explanation: 照片中路边公共设施维修队(utility crew)在升降机(cherry picker)上维修架空电线(overhead power lines)。C选项准确描述。

options.text: A road crew is filling potholes on the highway.
Workers are installing a traffic signal at the intersection.
A utility crew is servicing power lines from a cherry picker.
Landscapers are trimming bushes along the sidewalk.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: An outdoor cafe with patrons seated at wrought-iron tables under a striped awning.
questions.explanation: 照片中户外咖啡馆顾客坐在铸铁桌(wrought-iron tables)旁，头顶有条纹遮阳篷(striped awning)。B选项准确描述。注意awning是TOEIC难点词汇。

options.text: A vendor is selling food from a street cart.
Diners are seated at outdoor tables beneath a striped awning.
A waiter is setting up tables inside the restaurant.
Customers are standing in line at a food truck.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A person in business attire standing at a podium in a large auditorium with a presentation displayed on a screen.
questions.explanation: 照片中穿商务装的人站在大礼堂的讲台前，屏幕上有演示文稿。需要仔细区分：A说在做演讲最准确，B说在接受采访，C说在参加颁奖典礼，D说在主持讨论会，都与照片中单人在讲台演讲的场景不完全匹配。

options.text: A speaker is delivering a presentation to an audience in an auditorium.
A journalist is conducting an interview on stage.
An executive is receiving an award at a ceremony.
A moderator is facilitating a panel discussion.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A woman in a lab coat is pipetting a liquid into a test tube while looking at a monitor displaying data.
questions.explanation: 照片中穿实验服的女性用移液器(pipette)将液体移入试管，同时看着显示数据的监视器。需要仔细区分各选项：B最准确，A没提到监视器，C说在清洗设备，D说在记录笔记。

options.text: A scientist is pouring chemicals into a beaker.
A researcher is pipetting a sample into a test tube while monitoring results on a screen.
A lab assistant is cleaning glassware at the sink.
A technician is recording notes on a clipboard.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: Workers in a factory are inspecting items on a conveyor belt. Some items have been set aside on a separate table.
questions.explanation: 照片中工厂工人在传送带上检查物品，一些物品被放到旁边的桌子上。需要仔细区分：D最准确描述了质量检查过程，A说在包装，B说在组装，C说在修理传送带，不够准确。

options.text: Workers are packaging finished products into boxes on the conveyor belt.
Employees are assembling components at their workstations.
A technician is repairing the conveyor belt mechanism.
Quality control workers are examining items on the belt and sorting rejected ones onto a side table.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A man is leaning over a railing on a balcony overlooking a courtyard where several people are walking.
questions.explanation: 照片中一名男性靠在阳台栏杆上俯瞰庭院，庭院里有几个人在走路。各选项非常相似，C最准确。A说在浇花，B没提到楼下的人，D说在和楼下的人说话，不正确。

options.text: A man is watering plants on a balcony above a garden.
A man is standing on a balcony looking at the sky.
A man is leaning on a balcony railing overlooking a courtyard with pedestrians below.
A man is calling down to people from an upper-floor terrace.

questions.stem: Look at the photo: A receptionist is handing a visitor badge to a man in a suit while another person waits behind him holding a briefcase.
questions.explanation: 照片中接待员在给穿西装的男性递访客证，另一个人拿着公文包在后面等待。各选项都涉及前台场景，需仔细区分：A最完整准确地描述了两个人和访客证的细节。

options.text: A receptionist is issuing a visitor badge to a guest while another visitor waits in line with a briefcase.
A security guard is checking identification at the building entrance.
Two businessmen are signing in at the front desk simultaneously.
A receptionist is answering the phone while guests wait at the counter.

questions.stem: Where is the nearest post office?
questions.explanation: 这是一个where问句，问最近的邮局在哪里。需要选包含地点信息的回答。B回答了具体位置（在银行旁边两个街区远），最符合。

options.text: It closes at five o'clock.
It's two blocks away, next to the bank.
Yes, I mailed it yesterday.
About thirty minutes.

questions.stem: When does the morning shift start?
questions.explanation: 这是一个when问句，问早班什么时候开始。需要选包含时间信息的回答。A回答了具体时间（早上六点），最符合。

options.text: At six in the morning.
In the main warehouse.
About ten employees.
Yes, I work the morning shift.

questions.stem: Who is in charge of the marketing department?
questions.explanation: 这是一个who问句，问谁负责市场部。需要选包含人名或人物信息的回答。D回答了具体人名（Ms. Tanaka），最符合。

options.text: On the third floor.
Since last January.
Yes, the marketing campaign was successful.
Ms. Tanaka has been the director for two years.

questions.stem: Where did you park your car?
questions.explanation: 这是一个where问句，问把车停在哪里了。需要选包含地点信息的回答。C回答了具体停车位置（地下车库B层），最符合。

options.text: About two hours ago.
It's a blue sedan.
In the underground garage on level B.
No, I took the bus today.

questions.stem: When is the deadline for the project proposal?
questions.explanation: 这是一个when问句，问项目提案的截止日期是什么时候。需要选包含时间信息的回答。B回答了具体日期（这周五之前），最符合。

options.text: The project manager approved it.
By this Friday at the latest.
About twenty pages long.
In the conference room.

questions.stem: Who should I contact about the broken air conditioner?
questions.explanation: 这是一个who问句，问空调坏了应该联系谁。需要选包含人物信息的回答。A回答了具体联系对象（维修部门），最符合。

options.text: Call the maintenance department at extension 305.
It was installed last summer.
The temperature is quite comfortable.
Yes, the air conditioner is working fine.

questions.stem: Where can I find the employee handbook?
questions.explanation: 这是一个where问句，问在哪里能找到员工手册。需要选包含地点或获取方式的回答。D回答了具体获取方式（公司内网上有电子版），最符合。

options.text: It was updated last month.
About fifty pages.
Mr. Johnson wrote it.
There's a digital copy on the company intranet.

questions.stem: When will the new office furniture arrive?
questions.explanation: 这是一个when问句，问新办公家具什么时候到。需要选包含时间信息的回答。C回答了具体时间（下周一），最符合。

options.text: From a local supplier.
Desks and chairs.
It's scheduled for delivery next Monday.
On the second floor.

questions.stem: Why was the meeting rescheduled to Thursday?
questions.explanation: 这是一个why问句，问为什么会议改到周四。需要选包含原因的回答。A回答了具体原因（主任有冲突），最符合why问句的回答方式。

options.text: Because the director had a scheduling conflict.
In the large conference room.
About fifteen attendees.
Yes, it was rescheduled.

questions.stem: How do I submit a reimbursement request?
questions.explanation: 这是一个how问句，问如何提交报销申请。需要选包含方法或步骤的回答。B回答了具体方法（填写网上表格并附上收据），最符合。

options.text: The reimbursement was approved.
Fill out the online form and attach your receipts.
By next Friday.
About two hundred dollars.

questions.stem: Why hasn't the shipment arrived yet?
questions.explanation: 这是一个why问句，问为什么货物还没到。需要选包含原因的回答。C回答了原因（港口有延误），最符合why问句。注意D是yes/no回答，不适合why问句。

options.text: About fifty boxes.
To the main warehouse.
There's been a delay at the port due to bad weather.
Yes, it arrived this morning.

questions.stem: How long will the renovation take?
questions.explanation: 这是一个how long问句，问装修要多久。需要选包含时间长度的回答。D回答了具体时间段（大约三周），最符合how long问句。

options.text: The renovation company is very professional.
On the first floor.
It costs about ten thousand dollars.
The contractor estimated about three weeks.

questions.stem: How much does it cost to rent the banquet hall?
questions.explanation: 这是一个how much问句，问租宴会厅要多少钱。需要选包含价格信息的回答。A回答了具体价格（每晚五百美元），最符合how much问句。

options.text: It's five hundred dollars per evening.
It can accommodate up to two hundred guests.
The banquet is on Saturday.
Yes, it's available for rent.

questions.stem: Why did you choose this vendor over the others?
questions.explanation: 这是一个why问句，问为什么选择这个供应商。需要选包含原因的回答。B回答了选择的理由（他们价格最好且交货记录良好），最符合。

options.text: We have three vendors in total.
They offered the best price and have a strong delivery record.
The order was placed last week.
In the purchasing department.

questions.stem: How often are performance reviews conducted?
questions.explanation: 这是一个how often问句，问绩效评估多久进行一次。需要选包含频率信息的回答。C回答了具体频率（每年两次），最符合how often问句。

options.text: My review went very well.
The HR manager conducts them.
Twice a year, in June and December.
Yes, they're very thorough.

questions.stem: How should I address the envelope for the overseas client?
questions.explanation: 这是一个how问句，问如何给海外客户的信封写地址。需要选包含方法的回答。D回答了具体方法（用国际格式并加上国家名称），最符合。

options.text: The client is based in London.
It was sent by express mail.
About five business days.
Use the international format and include the country name.

questions.stem: How many copies of the report do we need for the board meeting?
questions.explanation: 这是一个how many问句，问董事会需要几份报告副本。需要选包含数量的回答。A回答了具体数量（十二份，每位成员一份），最符合。

options.text: Twelve copies, one for each board member.
The report is about thirty pages.
It was printed in color.
The meeting starts at two o'clock.

questions.stem: Why don't we take a short break before continuing?
questions.explanation: 这是一个建议句型(Why don't we...)，表示建议休息一下。需要选回应建议的答案。B同意了建议（好主意），最符合对建议的回应。

options.text: Because we started late this morning.
That sounds like a good idea. I could use some coffee.
The break room is down the hall.
About fifteen minutes.

questions.stem: How do I connect to the wireless network in the office?
questions.explanation: 这是一个how问句，问如何连接办公室无线网络。需要选包含连接方法的回答。C回答了具体步骤（选择公司网络并输入密码），最符合。

options.text: The network was installed last month.
It's a high-speed connection.
Select the company network and enter the password posted on the bulletin board.
Yes, we have wireless access.

questions.stem: Would you like me to reserve a meeting room for the client visit?
questions.explanation: 这是一个Would you like问句，表示提供帮助。需要选回应提议的答案。B回答接受了提议并补充了具体需求（大会议室，可以容纳八个人的），最符合对提议的回应。

options.text: The client visited us last Tuesday.
Yes, please book the large one that seats eight.
The meeting lasted about two hours.
Room 201 is on the second floor.

questions.stem: Do you know when the quarterly sales figures will be released?
questions.explanation: 这是一个嵌套问句(embedded question)，表面是yes/no问句，实际在问时间。不能只回答yes/no，需要提供时间信息。B回答了具体时间（应该在月底之前），最符合。

options.text: Yes, the sales were excellent.
They should be available by the end of the month.
The finance department handles that.
Quarterly reports are important.

questions.stem: The shipment was supposed to arrive yesterday, wasn't it?
questions.explanation: 这是一个反意疑问句(tag question)，说货物应该昨天到的。需要选确认或否认并提供相关信息的回答。C回答确认了延误并说明了新的到达时间，最符合。

options.text: About twenty boxes.
From the supplier in Shanghai.
Yes, but it was delayed. It should get here by tomorrow morning.
The shipping costs were reasonable.

questions.stem: Hasn't the new policy been communicated to all staff members?
questions.explanation: 这是一个否定疑问句(negative question)。说话者预期新政策已经通知给所有员工了。D回答说还没有并解释了原因（备忘录还在起草中），最准确回应了否定疑问。

options.text: The policy is about workplace safety.
Yes, I like the new policy.
We have about two hundred employees.
Not yet. The memo is still being drafted by HR.

questions.stem: Could you tell me where I can find the financial records from last quarter?
questions.explanation: 这是一个间接问句(embedded question)，用Could you tell me开头表示礼貌请求。需要提供地点信息。A回答了具体位置（在共享驱动器的财务文件夹里），最符合。

options.text: They're in the finance folder on the shared drive.
Yes, I could tell you.
Last quarter's revenue was strong.
The financial advisor is on vacation.

questions.stem: You've already submitted your expense report, haven't you?
questions.explanation: 这是一个反意疑问句(tag question)，确认对方是否已提交费用报告。B回答了实际情况（还在等一张收据），最恰当地回应了反意疑问。

options.text: The expenses were quite high this month.
Actually, I'm still waiting for one more receipt before I can finalize it.
The report is about ten pages.
Yes, expense reports are due on Friday.

questions.stem: Don't you think we should upgrade the software before the audit?
questions.explanation: 这是一个否定疑问句(negative question)，暗示说话者认为应该在审计前升级软件。C回答表示同意并补充了理由（现在的版本不符合新要求），最符合。

options.text: The audit is scheduled for next month.
The software costs about five thousand dollars.
I agree. The current version doesn't meet the new compliance requirements.
No, the software was installed last year.

questions.stem: Would you mind if I used the projector for my presentation this afternoon?
questions.explanation: 这是一个Would you mind问句，表示请求许可。注意Would you mind的否定回答表示同意。D回答'not at all'表示不介意（即同意），最恰当。

options.text: Yes, I mind very much.
The projector was purchased last year.
My presentation is about the quarterly results.
Not at all. I'll be done with it by noon.

questions.stem: Can you tell me who approved the budget increase?
questions.explanation: 这是一个嵌套问句(embedded question)，用Can you tell me开头。实际问的是谁批准了预算增加。A回答了具体人物（CFO在上次董事会上批准的），最符合。

options.text: The CFO signed off on it at the last board meeting.
Yes, I can tell you.
The budget was increased by ten percent.
Budget reviews happen every quarter.

questions.stem: The contract hasn't been signed by both parties yet, has it?
questions.explanation: 这是一个反意疑问句(tag question)，确认合同是否还没有双方签字。B回答了实际状态（一方已经签了，在等另一方），最恰当。

options.text: The contract is fifty pages long.
One party has signed, but we're still waiting on the other.
Our legal team reviewed it.
Yes, we need a new contract.

questions.stem: Shouldn't we inform the clients about the schedule change?
questions.explanation: 这是一个否定疑问句(negative question)，暗示应该通知客户日程变更。D回答表示已经在处理（我已经让秘书发邮件了），最恰当。

options.text: We have about thirty clients.
The schedule is posted on the bulletin board.
The change was quite unexpected.
Absolutely. I've already asked my assistant to send out an email notification.

questions.stem: Do you happen to know whether the training session has been rescheduled?
questions.explanation: 这是一个嵌套问句(embedded question)，用Do you happen to know whether开头，实际问培训是否改期。C回答了具体信息（是的，改到下周三了），最符合。

options.text: The training was very informative.
Yes, I happen to know.
Yes, it's been moved to next Wednesday at ten.
About twenty employees attended.

questions.stem: Weren't you supposed to submit the report by yesterday?
questions.explanation: 这是一个否定疑问句(negative question)，暗示报告应该昨天就交了。A回答解释了延迟原因并给出了新的提交时间，最恰当地回应了这个带有质疑语气的问题。

options.text: I asked for an extension because I needed more data from the research team.
The report covers our annual performance.
Yes, reports should be submitted on time.
I submitted three reports last month.

questions.stem: Would you like to join us for the client dinner tonight?
questions.explanation: 这是一个邀请问句。D是间接回答——没有直接说yes或no，而是说需要先确认保姆是否有空（暗示如果能安排好孩子就去），这种间接回答在TOEIC中是正确答案。

options.text: The restaurant is on Main Street.
We had dinner with them last month.
The client prefers Italian food.
Let me check if my babysitter is available first.

questions.stem: Have you had a chance to look at the proposal I sent over?
questions.explanation: 这是问对方是否看了提案。C是间接回答——没有直接说yes或no，而是说打印了但还没来得及仔细看（暗示收到了但还没完全审阅），这种委婉回答在TOEIC中常作为正确答案。

options.text: Yes, I sent it by email.
The proposal has ten sections.
I printed it out, but I haven't had time to go through it carefully yet.
Proposals are usually due on Monday.

questions.stem: Could you handle the presentation while I'm away at the conference?
questions.explanation: 这是请求帮忙做演讲。B是间接回答——没有直接说yes或no，而是问什么时候需要准备好（暗示愿意帮忙但需要了解时间），这种间接接受在TOEIC中是正确答案。

options.text: The conference is in Boston this year.
Sure. When do you need it ready by?
The presentation software needs updating.
I attended the conference last year.

questions.stem: Do you think we'll finish the inventory count by five?
questions.explanation: 这是问能否在五点前完成库存盘点。D是间接/意外的回答——没有直接回答能或不能，而是说取决于是否能多叫几个人来帮忙（暗示目前进度不确定），这种有条件的回答在TOEIC中常作为正确答案。

options.text: We counted about five hundred items.
The inventory is stored in the back.
Five o'clock is when the store closes.
That depends on whether we can get a few more people to help.

questions.stem: Didn't the supplier confirm the delivery date?
questions.explanation: 这是否定疑问句，问供应商是否确认了交货日期。A是间接/意外的回答——没有直接回答是或否，而是说最后一次联系他们时还在和物流部门确认（暗示还没有最终确认），这种转述情况的回答在TOEIC中常作为正确答案。

options.text: When I last spoke with them, they were still checking with their logistics team.
The supplier is based in Germany.
Yes, we need to confirm the date.
Delivery charges are included in the price.

questions.stem: Should we postpone the product launch until the marketing materials are ready?
questions.explanation: 这是问是否应该推迟产品发布。C是间接/意外的回答——没有直接说应该或不应该，而是建议可以先用现有材料做软发布（提供了一个折中方案），这种提供替代方案的回答在TOEIC中常作为正确答案。

options.text: The product launch was very successful.
The marketing team has five members.
We could do a soft launch with the existing materials and update them later.
Marketing materials include brochures and flyers.

questions.stem: Is there any way we could get an extension on the filing deadline?
questions.explanation: 这是问能否延长申报截止日期。B是间接/意外的回答——没有直接说能或不能，而是说以前他们通情达理过（暗示可能可以，值得一试），这种基于过往经验的间接回答在TOEIC中常作为正确答案。

options.text: The deadline is next Friday.
I know they've been flexible about it in the past, so it's worth asking.
The filing system was reorganized recently.
Extensions are usually two weeks.

questions.stem: Has anyone volunteered to organize the company picnic this year?
questions.explanation: 这是问是否有人自愿组织公司野餐。D是间接/意外的回答——没有直接说有或没有，而是暗示自己可能会做（如果没人的话我可以考虑），这种含蓄的自荐回答在TOEIC中常作为正确答案。

options.text: The picnic was at the park last year.
We usually have about a hundred attendees.
Volunteers receive a gift card.
Not that I know of, but I wouldn't mind taking it on if no one else steps up.
